def positive_training_loop_without_zero_grad():
    rule_id = "training_loop_without_zero_grad"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "warning"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "optimizer.step() appears without an obvious zero_grad() reset."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
